summary: Tested all 6 new feature sets from iteration 4: QR removal, logo update, OIG order fix, technician status restrictions (backend + UI), date-range filter, quick stats bar, and print hint. 17/17 backend tests pass. All frontend features working EXCEPT one date filter logic bug.

ui_bugs.issue: Records with no date_imaged are NOT excluded when a date range is active. Bug in filter logic: `!start || !recordDate || recordDate >= start` - the `!recordDate` condition causes null-date records to always pass through. Requirement says they should be EXCLUDED when a date range is active.
ui_bugs.current_code:
const matchesStart = !start || !recordDate || recordDate >= start;
const matchesEnd   = !end   || !recordDate || recordDate <= end;
ui_bugs.fix_required:
const matchesStart = !start || (recordDate !== null && recordDate >= start);
const matchesEnd   = !end   || (recordDate !== null && recordDate <= end);
ui_bugs.confirmed_by_test: Record UI-FORM-SAVE-001 (no date_imaged) still shows when date range 01/01/2025-01/31/2025 is set

features_verified.qr_code_removed: ✅ No QR code in PrintViewPage - no import, no element in DOM
features_verified.logo_url_updated: ✅ Both IntakeFormPage and PrintViewPage use new URL: job_a73babea-9e6d-474e-b216-bf87e9a53159
features_verified.oig_order_fixed: ✅ oig_3_4 (wireless internet) correctly positioned BETWEEN oig_3_3 (lock up) and oig_3_5 (CD-ROM) in both pages
features_verified.tech_ui_restriction_dashboard: ✅ Dashboard status dropdown shows 'Donated (admin only)' and 'Sold (admin only)' as disabled options for technician
features_verified.tech_ui_restriction_intake_form: ✅ IntakeForm status select shows 'Donated (admin only)' and 'Sold (admin only)' as disabled options for technician
features_verified.backend_403_restriction: ✅ PATCH /api/computers/{serial_no}/status returns 403 for Donated/Sold when technician. Allows Processing/In Stock/Pending Review/Pending Delivery
features_verified.backend_403_put_restriction: ✅ PUT /api/computers/{serial_no} returns 403 when technician tries to set Donated or Sold status
features_verified.admin_can_set_donated_sold: ✅ Admin can set Donated and Sold via PATCH and PUT
features_verified.clear_dates_button: ✅ 'Clear dates' button (data-testid=clear-date-filter) appears when dates entered, disappears after clearing
features_verified.stat_testids: ✅ All 4 stat cards found: stat-total, stat-in-stock, stat-pending, stat-donated-sold
features_verified.stats_reflect_filtered: ✅ Stats update when search filter applied
features_verified.print_hint_absent_before_click: ✅ No print hint visible before clicking print button
features_verified.print_hint_shown_after_click: ✅ Print hint 'If the print dialog did not open, press Ctrl+P (Windows) or Cmd+P (Mac).' shown after clicking Print button
features_verified.window_print_called: ✅ window.print() is triggered when Print button clicked
features_verified.date_filter_with_dates_present: ✅ Records with date_imaged within range are shown
features_verified.date_filter_excludes_null_dates: ❌ BUG: Records with no date_imaged are NOT excluded when date range is active

action_items: Fix date filter logic in DashboardPage.jsx lines 149-150: Change `const matchesStart = !start || !recordDate || recordDate >= start;` to `const matchesStart = !start || (recordDate !== null && recordDate >= start);` and same fix for matchesEnd. This ensures records with no date_imaged are excluded when a date range is active.
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardPage.jsx lines 149-150: Date filter includes records with null date_imaged when date range is active. Fix: remove the `!recordDate` short-circuit condition.

success_rate.frontend: 94% (1 bug: date filter logic for null date_imaged records)

test_credentials: Admin: admin/Admin@12345. Tech user uitesttech was created and deleted during testing.
seed_data_creation: Created/used ITER4-TEST-STATUS-001 for backend tests (cleaned up). Used existing UI-FORM-SAVE-001 for UI tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features verified except date filter logic bug. Frontend: QR removed ✅, logo updated ✅, OIG order fixed ✅, technician Donated/Sold restrictions UI ✅, print hint ✅, stats bar ✅, date inputs type=text ✅, clear dates button ✅. One bug: records with no date_imaged still show when date range is active. Admin creds: admin/Admin@12345.
rca_of_issue: Date filter bug RCA: In DashboardPage.jsx lines 149-150, the filter condition `!start || !recordDate || recordDate >= start` has a short-circuit: when recordDate is null (record has no date_imaged), `!recordDate` evaluates to true, making the entire expression true regardless of whether a date range is active. Fix: Replace with `!start || (recordDate !== null && recordDate >= start)` to properly exclude null-date records when a start/end date filter is set.
